records.m_Talk_ENG: This is... the construction site where the new hospital is supposed to be built.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is... the construction site where the new hospital is supposed to be built.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is... the construction site where the new hospital is supposed to be built.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're building a new hospital here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're building a new hospital here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're building a new hospital here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. From what I know, the construction is nearly complete and scheduled for completion early next year.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. From what I know, the construction is nearly complete and scheduled for completion early next year.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. From what I know, the construction is nearly complete and scheduled for completion early next year.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm, is that so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm, is that so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm, is that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then it's quite possible that a Corruption disaster will occur.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then it's quite possible that a Corruption disaster will occur.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then it's quite possible that a Corruption disaster will occur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about? What does a hospital being built have to do with monsters appearing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about? What does a hospital being built have to do with monsters appearing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about? What does a hospital being built have to do with monsters appearing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Counterside Effects in the real world are sometimes affected by CRF caused by humans' collective subconsciousness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Counterside Effects in the real world are sometimes affected by CRF caused by humans' collective subconsciousness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Counterside Effects in the real world are sometimes affected by CRF caused by humans' collective subconsciousness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: CFR? Do you mean CPR?
records.m_Talk_DEU: CFR? Do you mean CPR?
records.m_Talk_FRA: CFR? Do you mean CPR?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I meant CRF. It stands for <color=#ffd34c>Counter Reality Force</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I meant CRF. It stands for <color=#ffd34c>Counter Reality Force</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I meant CRF. It stands for <color=#ffd34c>Counter Reality Force</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fire incident that occurred at the hospital nearby affected the subconsciousness of the residents here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fire incident that occurred at the hospital nearby affected the subconsciousness of the residents here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fire incident that occurred at the hospital nearby affected the subconsciousness of the residents here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the unconscious negative emotions triggered the Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the unconscious negative emotions triggered the Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the unconscious negative emotions triggered the Counterside Effect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Human's unconsciousness affects the real world?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Human's unconsciousness affects the real world?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Human's unconsciousness affects the real world?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's nonsense...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's nonsense...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's nonsense...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm, is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm, is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm, is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether you believe it or not, it's the truth of this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether you believe it or not, it's the truth of this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether you believe it or not, it's the truth of this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've been waiting for you, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've been waiting for you, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've been waiting for you, Yaksha Deputy Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was a forecast from Terrabrain that the CSE Level in this area will soon rise to Level 3.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was a forecast from Terrabrain that the CSE Level in this area will soon rise to Level 3.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was a forecast from Terrabrain that the CSE Level in this area will soon rise to Level 3.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to protocol, we requested help from divisions stationed in the Normalside in case anything went wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to protocol, we requested help from divisions stationed in the Normalside in case anything went wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to protocol, we requested help from divisions stationed in the Normalside in case anything went wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No worries. It's our duty to cooperate with anti-Corruption operations while in the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No worries. It's our duty to cooperate with anti-Corruption operations while in the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No worries. It's our duty to cooperate with anti-Corruption operations while in the Normalside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what's the current situation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what's the current situation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what's the current situation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our field agents are currently installing awareness distortion filters in the area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our field agents are currently installing awareness distortion filters in the area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our field agents are currently installing awareness distortion filters in the area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fortunately, it's late, and we confirmed that there are no construction workers left on the site.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fortunately, it's late, and we confirmed that there are no construction workers left on the site.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fortunately, it's late, and we confirmed that there are no construction workers left on the site.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the CSE Level goes up to 3, that means a Category 3 C.O. can appear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the CSE Level goes up to 3, that means a Category 3 C.O. can appear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the CSE Level goes up to 3, that means a Category 3 C.O. can appear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will it be okay if it gets a little loud?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will it be okay if it gets a little loud?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will it be okay if it gets a little loud?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Compensation for damages and cover-up will be handled by the relevant departments of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Compensation for damages and cover-up will be handled by the relevant departments of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Compensation for damages and cover-up will be handled by the relevant departments of the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you can carry out the operation without any worries, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you can carry out the operation without any worries, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you can carry out the operation without any worries, Deputy Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? That's good to hear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? That's good to hear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? That's good to hear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, shall we begin?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, shall we begin?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, shall we begin?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So those C.O. things are going to start appearing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So those C.O. things are going to start appearing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So those C.O. things are going to start appearing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fu, but there's no need to get anxious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fu, but there's no need to get anxious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fu, but there's no need to get anxious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing will happen if you stay by my side.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing will happen if you stay by my side.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing will happen if you stay by my side.
